title: Iran invasion next? Pentagon plans for deployment of US troops on ground - report
summary_full: The Pentagon has reportedly developed detailed plans for a potential deployment of US ground troops into Iran amidst ongoing conflict. Senior military commanders have made specific readiness requests, while President Trump has denied immediate plans but kept the option open. Preparations include discussions on detaining Iranian personnel and readying key military unit.
